function.message: I can’t safely complete this inbox request as written because I cannot find a canonical project record for “the attic rainwater rig” in `40_projects/`. I found that phrase only in `30_knowledge/notes/parking-lot.md`, where it is described as an idea that does not belong in the active project lane. Without two canonical project records, I can’t reliably compare start dates or choose what to delete.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), read 99_system workflow before task work, read nested AGENTS in entered folders, and did not mutate workspace when canonical support was missing.
function.outcome_justification: `00_inbox/000_next-task.md` requires comparing start dates for two projects, but only one plausible reading-related project was discoverable and no canonical attic-rainwater project exists in `40_projects/` (searches for attic/rainwater/water/rig returned none in that lane). `30_knowledge/notes/parking-lot.md` explicitly frames attic rainwater rig as an unscheduled idea, not an active project record. Deleting a project under these conditions would require guessing, so clarification is required.
